title: Congress factions in Kerala ‘wishcasting’ for their respective loyalists as KPCC president’s post comes up for grabs
description: A Congress insider says AICC seems resolved to prevent current jockeying for KPCC chief’s post from backsliding into a self-destructive circular firing squad at a crucial time when ‘Team-UDF’ seeks to cast LDF, still smarting from its historic defeat, as the alliance in disarray
